title: Strategy sells 3,588 BTC for $216 million, with total bitcoin holdings still underwater
message_html: Strategy sells 3,588 BTC for $216 million, with total bitcoin holdings still underwater ...
snippet: Strategy's total holdings account for more than 4% of the 21 million bitcoin supply cap — worth around $52.3 billion.

title: Ripple secures full MiCA CASP authorization for crypto services across 30 EEA countries
message_html: Ripple secures full MiCA CASP authorization for crypto services across 30 EEA countries ...
snippet: Ripple secured full MiCA CASP authorization from Luxembourg for regulated crypto services across all 30 European Economic Area countries.
